title: Honor Power3 aims to break the mainstream smartphone battery capacity record
description: The Honor Power2 launched back in January with a massive 10,080 mAh battery, but the brand isn't resting on its laurels - far from it, in fact. According to a new rumor from China today, Honor is already working on the Power3, and this one may break the mainstream smartphone battery capacity record. Honor allegedly aims for its battery capacity to be 11,000-12,000 mAh, but the exact number hasn't been decided on just yet. The phone will be powered by the upcoming MediaTek Dimensity 8600 SoC. Honor Power2 The Power3 will have a 6.8-inch flat LTPS OLED screen with "1.5K" resolution....

title: Sony 1000X The ColleXion in for review
description: If you're into headphones, then you're no doubt familiar with Sony's WH-1000X series, which is easily one of the most popular wireless over-ear noise-cancelling headphones around. One could say that alongside the Bose QuietComfort 35, which started the trend, Sony's 1000X series has been the most popular option for years. An achievement remarkably maintained even after many others, including Apple, joined the space. Sony's line of wireless over-ear ANC headphones turns 10 (wow), so the Japanese made something special to mark the occasion - meet the Sony 1000x The ColleXion (reads like...

title: Microsoft announced the new Surface Laptop 8 series and Surface Pro
description: Microsoft updated four of its laptops today - the Surface Pro 13, the Surface Laptop 13-inch, Surface Laptop 13.8-inch and Surface Laptop 15-inch. The new devices run on the recently released Intel Core Ultra Series 3 chips, but Snapdragon X2-powered versions are expected later this year. Surface Laptop Starting with the most important updates - the Surface Laptop 13.8 and 15-inch. They now come with new display options, some of which include a privacy screen feature similar to the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra's. The 15-inch model gets a higher resolution, but it's still LCD. OLED...

title: The media starts receiving the first Trump Mobile T1 Phone units, launch is imminent
description: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone was supposed to launch last year in August, but many future customers who put a $100 pre-sale order were left empty-handed until now. It looks like the T1 Phone is actually happening as the company started distributing units to media, which in turn means that the actual shipments to customers will begin shortly. But there's a catch. If you haven't followed the news around the T1 Phone lately, you will be surprised to see a couple of discrepancies. The most obvious one is the new design, which is a lot different from the initial one. Also, the American flag at...

title: Samsung and Google unveil AI-powered smart glasses at Google I/O 2026
description: In October last year, Samsung announced that it was developing AI-powered smart glasses in collaboration with Google and eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker. Now, at Google I/O 2026, the companies have offered the first official look at the upcoming Android XR running wearable. The AI smart glasses will be available in two distinct designs, one created by Gentle Monster and the other by Warby Parker. While Google and Samsung have yet to reveal detailed hardware specifications, they did highlight several of the key features the glasses will offer. According to Google and...

title: Lenovo Legion Y70 debuts with 8,000mAh battery, SD 8 Gen 5 and 144Hz screen
description: Lenovo is back into the smartphone-making game with the Legion Y70 (2026). The Chinese brand hasn't released a phone under its own name since the Y90 in 2022. We knew most, if not all, about the Legion Y70 from the various teasers leading up to this announcement. It's a gaming phone with solid specs and a bonkers 8,000mAh battery with 90W charging and bypass charging capabilities. The Legion Y70 packs the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 (the non-Elite) SoC with 12GB or 16GB of LPDDR5X RAM, running at up to 9,600Mbps. There's 256GB of UFS 4.1-speed storage. Cooling is handled by a 5,500mm2 vapor...

title: Sony WH-1000X The ColleXion bring premium design and updated drivers
description: Sony’s WH-1000X series over-ear headphones have become synonymous with noise-canceling, and it all started with the MDR-1000X, which are coincidentally turning 10 years old later this year. To mark the occasion, Sony is releasing a new pair of flagship headphones and if you thought they would come with a normal name, think again. Sony’s WH-1000X The ColleXion (pronounced the collection) slots in as the top-of-the-line entry in the WH-1000X series. While they share key components and features with the WH-1000XM6, the new pair offers several enhancements, including a more premium...

title: Google I/O 2026: what to expect
description: It’s almost time for one of Google’s busiest days of the year – its annual I/O developer conference. These events are traditionally pretty dense with both software and hardware announcements, and this year’s keynote is set to be jam-packed. We should be getting details on Android 17 and its rollout schedule, a glimpse into Google’s long-awaited ChromeOS successor - Aluminum OS. It’s safe to assume that Google will announce new versions of its Gemini models, and we’re also expecting to see the first batch of Android XR glasses, too. Here’s everything we expect to see at this year’s I/O...

title: Watch Sony unveil its latest flagship headphones live here
description: Sony has scheduled a live event for 4PM UTC, dedicated to its upcoming flagship WH-1000X headphones series. The previous generation WH-1000XM6 launched about a year ago, but this is not going to be a direct successor. Rumors so far indicate that the new headphones will actually be more premium, meaning they won't replace the XM6 but will exist alongside them. The reports claim a price tag of $649, which is a tad more expensive than your usual WH-1000X headphones and a new leather design. We will likely see a new name for the upcoming headphones dubbed ColleXion. Of course, aside...

title: Watch the Google I/O 2026 keynote live here
description: Google’s annual developer conference is kicking off later today, and as usual, the event will be held at Google HQ in Mountain View, California. The keynote starts at 10 AM PT (5PM UTC), and you’ll be able to watch all of it via the stream linked below. The brief version is a formal introduction to Android 17 alongside its rollout schedule. We're also expecting details for Google’s new Android-based PC operating system, bearing the Aluminum OS codename. We should also see the first batch of Android XR glasses and updates to the Google Gemini models. Our homepage will have detailed...

title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro+ teased ahead of launch
description: Motorola's Edge 70 series currently includes four smartphones - Edge 70, Edge 70 Pro, Edge 70 Fusion, and Edge 70 Fusion+. These will soon be joined by the Edge 70 Pro+, which has been teased by Motorola's Indian branch. [#InlinePriceWidget,14620,1#] The image posted by Motorola India on X gives us a glimpse of the Edge 70 Pro+'s design, which is identical to the global Edge 70 Pro's Pantone Zinfandel model. The text around the flash is also the same as the global Edge 70 Pro. For those unaware, the global Edge 70 Pro comes with wireless charging support and an additional 50MP...

title: Honor partners with world record holding marathon runner Sebastian Sawe
description: Today Honor has announced that it's partnering up with Kenyan marathon runner Sebastian Sawe, who currently holds the world record in marathon by going under two hours (1:59:30 to be exact). Sawe will be Honor's newest brand ambassador. Honor refers to him as its "Global Chief Running Partner". Maybe that should be "Global Chief Human Running Partner", though, seeing as how the company's D1 humanoid robot has recently broken the human half-marathon record? Anyway, "limits are made to be broken", Honor says while also subtly teasing exciting things to come. The company is going to be...

title: Moto G37 and G37 Power debut in India with a Dimensity 6400 chipset
description: Motorola has officially brought the Moto G37 and Moto G37 Power to India. The phones launched in the country are largely similar to the global models, which were announced last month. The Moto G37 and Moto G37 Power are equipped with the Dimensity 6400 chipset in India, whereas the global variants get a less powerful Dimensity 6300 SoC. Other than the difference in the chipset used, the global and Indian models of the handsets share the exact specifications. Both phones sport a 6.7-inch LCD display that offers a refresh rate of 120Hz and an HD+ resolution. The display is...

title: Gurman: iOS 27 is coming with standalone Siri app, updated AI writing tools and Shortcuts
description: Ahead of WWDC 2026, which is now confirmed to kick off on June 8, Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman shared several details regarding the upcoming iOS and iPadOS 27 updates, including the standalone Siri app. It is described as a ChatGPT and Claude-style chatbot app serving as a one-stop shop for a broad range of tasks. The app will include past user conversations and is reportedly positioned to be ad-free and offer auto-deleting chats. Gurman also details Apple’s prolonged focus on user privacy, which forced the company to delay its AI assistant as it aims to handle user data on its own servers....

title: Motorola Edge (2026) seen with a flat display, triple rear cameras in leaked renders
description: Motorola is expected to unveil the successor to the Edge (2025), which debuted in May last year, in the coming weeks. Ahead of anything official, leaked renders of the Motorola Edge (2026) have surfaced online, offering an early look at the device’s design. The leaked renders show the alleged Motorola Edge (2026) in an olive green finish with a textured rear panel. While the overall design remains familiar, the upcoming model appears to introduce a few notable changes. The most obvious change is the display, which now appears to be flat instead of curved like the panel on the...

title: Samsung releases One UI 8.5 stable update for four more Galaxy smartphones
description: Samsung began rolling out the stable One UI 8.5 update about a couple of weeks ago, and it's now available for four more smartphones - Galaxy A36, Galaxy A56, Galaxy Z Fold5, and Galaxy Z Flip5. [#InlinePriceWidget,13497,1#] The One UI 8.5 stable update for the Samsung Galaxy A36 is rolling out in South Korea with firmware version A366NKSU6CZDA. The stable One UI 8.5 for the Galaxy A56 is also rolling out in South Korea, but its firmware version is not known. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold5 The firmware version of stable One UI 8.5 for the Galaxy Z Fold5 and Flip5 is also unknown, but we...

title: Apple's WWDC 2026 kicks off on June 8
description: Apple has announced the dates for its annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) and has begun sending out invitations for the event. As usual, the keynote is expected to showcase the company’s next-generation software updates, including iOS 27, iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, macOS 27, tvOS 27, and visionOS 27. WWDC 2026 will kick off on June 8 with Apple’s opening keynote. This year’s conference has the tagline “Coming bright up”. The presentation could be one of the final WWDC keynotes hosted by Tim Cook as CEO of the company. The keynote will be available to stream on Apple’s YouTube...

title: Oppo Reno16 series, Pad 6, Enco Air 5s and more to debut on May 25
description: Oppo has officially announced the launch date for its upcoming Oppo Reno16 series. Alongside the new smartphones, the company will also unveil the Oppo Pad 6, Oppo Enco Air 5s, and a new selfie display accessory called Oppo Bubble. The Oppo Reno16, Reno16 Pro, Pad 6, Enco Air 5s will debut in China on May 25. Pre-reservations for the devices are now open on Oppo’s official online store in the country. Oppo has also confirmed that the Reno16 series will feature a 200MP triple rear camera setup. The Pro model will be available in Heartbeat, Dream Blue, and Moonlit Black color...

title: This is when RedMagic is launching its next gaming tablet
description: RedMagic launched the Astra gaming tablet internationally last June, and now it's almost ready to unveil its successor. We assume this will be called Astra 2 globally, but inside China it will be known as the RedMagic Tablet 5 Pro (the original Astra was the Tablet 3 Pro and they're skipping the number 4 due to tetraphobia). Today during its launch of the 11S Pro series, RedMagic has also started teasing the upcoming tablet, with the image you can see below. The brand has revealed that the tablet will become official in June, so almost exactly one year after its predecessor. The new...

title: That Apple Card free AirPods Pro 3 promo is now live but it's worse than expected
description: A few days ago word got out that Apple was preparing a new offer for those signing up for the Apple Card - a free pair of AirPods Pro 3. Today the promo has gone live, but it's not as straightforward as the leak implied. So, you need to be a new customer not having had an Apple Card before, and apply for one by June 15. With your new Apple Card, you then buy a pair of AirPods Pro 3 directly from Apple until June 15. Then, from July 1, 2026 and until April 30, 2027 you can earn $25 cashback each month for a total of ten months. After those ten months the $250 you spent on the AirPods Pro 3...
